libraries.title: Ir Cp Schiff-Base Library
libraries.description: 1,440 iridium Cp Schiff-base compounds from a combinatorial library screened for antibacterial activity against S. aureus and E. coli, and for cytotoxicity against HEK293T cells.

libraries.title: Metal-Triazole Combinatorial Library
libraries.description: 864 metal-triazole compounds from two combinatorial series (Tz-4-P and Tz-1-MP) across multiple metal scaffolds (IrCN, Re(CO)₃, Mn(CO)₃, RuCy), screened for antibacterial activity against S. aureus and cytotoxicity against HEK293T cells.

libraries.title: N,O-Schiff Base Ru/Ir Library
libraries.description: 176 N,O-Schiff-base compounds from a combinatorial library across two half-sandwich metal scaffolds (Ir Cp*, Ru cymene), screened for antibacterial activity against S. aureus and E. coli, and cytotoxicity against HEK293T cells.

libraries.title: Manganese(I) Schiff-Base Library
libraries.description: 420 manganese(I) tricarbonyl Schiff-base compounds from a combinatorial library (6 axial ligands × 10 amines × 7 aldehydes), screened for antibacterial activity against MRSA.
